page_metadata.biotools__summary: sgTarget is a structural genomics resource that helps to select and prioritize good targets for structure determination from a list of sequences.  Target selection is based on multiple factors including homology searches and a range of physiochemical properties.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: sgTarget is a structural genomics resource that helps to select and prioritize good targets for structure determination from a list of sequences.  Target selection is based on multiple factors including homology searches and a range of physiochemical properties.
